title: Scientists say the world's oldest octopus fossil isn't an octopus after all - ABC News
description: Scientists say the world's oldest octopus fossil isn't an octopus after all ABC News "Weird blob" creature thought to be the world's oldest octopus isn't an octopus after all. Here's what scientists found. CBS News Earliest known octopus is not an octopus after all BBC This Fossil Once Rewrote Everything We Knew About Octopuses. title: Letter: Fossil fuel industry needs to be held accountable
Selectboard explores options for cutting fossil fuel emissions in Norwich
description: The Norwich Selectboard discussed ways to reduce fossil fuel use by the town, including researching solar power, using energy efficient heating sources, adding insulation at the fire department and purchasing electric vehicles, while also considering the potential ramifications of energy policy on housing affordability.
